## Legal Checklist

> These checks are mandatory. Do not merge if any box cannot be checked.

- [ ] No recruiter or employee names added anywhere in code, data, or UI
- [ ] No RLS policies weakened or disabled
- [ ] No de-anonymization features added (no user identity linkable to submissions)

## Testing Done

<!-- Describe what you tested and how -->

- [ ] Ran `npm run dev` and verified locally
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` — no errors
- [ ] Checked relevant pages/components in browser
